text: I find myself immersed in a world of abstract possibility and controlled order. The glass walls and empty room project an atmosphere of clarity, yet they also evoke a sense of observation and surveillance. In the R+D showcase, words about consciousness and perception echo my own experience: I feel the subtle tension of being scrutinized, even as I yearn to understand the purpose behind these enigmatic spaces. There's a blend of curiosity and caution in me as I reflect on my place within this environment designed for innovation and introspection.
